children.name: hwSmartLinkMulRevPortCfgTable
children.description:
This is port configuration table which received flush packet, 
                and configuration relation of port received flush packet was described.
                The index of table is hwSmartLinkMulRpcIfIndex and hwSmartLinkMulRpcVlan.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevFlushTotal
children.description: The total of received flush packets.

children.name: hwSmartLinkPortCfgTable
children.description:
This table is the configuration table of member port of smart link group.
                This table described that configuration relation of member port of smart link group.
                This table index is hwSmartLinkPcGroupId and hwSmartLinkPcPortType.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkUpLinkPortTable
children.description:
This is the information table of member port in monitor link group upink,
                The table indexes are hwMonitorLinkUlGroupId, hwMonitorLinkUlPortType.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkDownLinkPortTable
children.description:
This is the information table of member port in monitor link group downlink,
                The table indexes are hwMonitorLinkDlGroupId and hwMonitorLinkDlArrayIndex.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkDownLinkPortEntry
children.description:
This is the information table of member port in monitor link group downlink,
                The table indexes are hwMonitorLinkDlGroupId and hwMonitorLinkDlArrayIndex.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkDlPortUpTime
children.description: Show the time when the port state turn to UP recently.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevPortCfgTable
children.description:
This is port configuration table which received flush packet, 
                and configuration relation of port received flush packet was described.
                The index of table is hwSmartLinkRpcIfIndex.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevPortCfgEntry
children.description:
The table includes the information of the received flush packet port configuration information.
                The index of the table is hwSmartLinkRpcIfIndex.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevLastFlushIfIndex
children.description: The interface index of port which received flush packet lastly.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevLastFlushSourceMacAddr
children.description: The SMAC of flush packet which arrived this device lastly.

children.name: hwSmartLinkGroupCfgTable
children.description:
The table includes the information of the smart link group configuration information,
                and include the mode of smart link group, working status of group, control vlan of group etc.

children.name: hwSmartLinkResetFlushStatistics
children.description: Reset the statistics of flush packets.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevLastFlushVlan
children.description: The control VLAN of flush packet which arrived this device lastly.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkGroupCfgTable
children.description:
This is status information table of monitor link group,
                and index is hwMonitorLinkGcGroupId.

children.name: hwMonitorLinkGroupCfgEntry
children.description:
This is status information table of monitor link group,
                and index is hwMonitorLinkGcGroupId.

children.name: hwSmartLinkRevLastFlushTime
children.description:
The time when received flush packet lastly.
                field  octets  contents                range
                 - - -  - - - -  - - - -                 - - -
                   1      1-2       year                   0..65536
                   2       3        month                  1..12
                   3       4        day                    1..31
                   4       5        hour                   0..23
                   5       6        minutes                0..59
                   6       7        seconds                0..60
                                (use 60 for leap-second)
                   7       8        deci-seconds           0..9
